title: Java with Spring Boot framework
evidence: pom.xml - Spring Boot 3.2.4 configured, Java 17 as target version

title: SQLite database storage
evidence: src/main/resources/application.properties:1-2 - SQLite JDBC driver configured, pom.xml:39 - sqlite-jdbc dependency

title: JSON responses with HTTP status codes
evidence: src/main/java/com/example/books/controller/BookController.java - All endpoints use ResponseEntity with appropriate status codes (201, 204, 404, 400)

title: Input validation for required fields
evidence: src/main/java/com/example/books/model/Book.java:14,18 - @NotBlank validators on title and author; BookController.java:29 - @Valid annotation enforced

title: Working source code
evidence: Build succeeds (target/classes directory populated), all 10 tests pass with exit code 0

title: README.md with setup and run instructions
evidence: README.md exists with setup instructions (mvn spring-boot:run) and test instructions (mvn test)

title: At least 3 unit/integration tests
evidence: src/test/java/com/example/books/BookControllerTest.java - 10 tests: health, create, create validation (2), list, list with filter, getById, getById 404, update, delete
